reforms.description: A tax package was implemented to stimulate growth by widening tax breaks for training and research and development, as well as granting tax expenditures for accelerated investment in machinery and equipment.
reforms.package_name: Tax Incentives for R&D and Training
reforms.component_name: Tax Package for R&D and Training
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The tax incentives are designed to encourage private sector investment in R&D and training, which can enhance productivity and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The tax package has been actively applied since its implementation.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform significantly widens existing tax breaks, which is a notable change but not a complete overhaul of the system.
reforms.source_quote: In the second part of the year another stimulus package came into force, further widening the training and R&D allowances and granting tax expenditures for accelerated investment in machinery and equipment.

reforms.description: A technology package is being implemented to raise the level of R&D, promote clusters in basic research, and subsidize the employment of scientists in industry.
reforms.package_name: Technology Package for R&D and Clusters
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The technology package aims to enhance R&D capabilities and foster collaboration between public and private sectors, which can lead to increased innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The technology package is currently being implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change aimed at enhancing R&D and collaboration in the industry.
reforms.source_quote: A technology package being implemented which seeks to raise level of R&D. Clusters to be promoted in basic research and employment of scientists in industry subsidised.
